1039498256.description: Duration, in seconds, of the item's swing animation played when mining or attacking. Affects visuals only and does not impact attack frequency or other gameplay mechanics.

value.description: Duration, in seconds, of the item's swing animation played when mining or attacking. Affects visuals only and does not impact attack frequency or other gameplay mechanics.

1039498256.title: minecraft:swing_duration

1293304755.description: Wearable items can be worn by a player in a specified slot.

hides_player_location.description: Determines whether the Player's location is hidden on Locator Maps and the Locator Bar when the wearable item is worn. Default is false.

protection.description: How much protection the wearable item provides. Default is set to 0.

slot.description: Specifies where the item can be worn. If any non-hand slot is chosen, the max stack size is set to 1.
slot.title: EquipmentSlot

1293304755.title: minecraft:wearable

138513870.description: The repairable item component specifies which items can be used to repair this item, along with how much durability is gained.

repair_items.description: List of repair item entries. Each entry needs to define a list of strings for `items` that can be used for the repair and an optional `repair_amount` for how much durability is gained.

138513870.title: minecraft:repairable

1570893760.description: The display_name item component specifies the text shown whenever an item's name is displayed, like in hover text.
1570893760.title: minecraft:display_name

1612372290.description: Adds a cooldown to the item so that, after performing an action of the specified "type", all items with a "minecraft:cooldown" component in the same "category" become unable to perform that same type of action for the number of seconds defined in "duration".

category.description: All items sharing the same "category" are put on cooldown when an action of the specified "type" is performed.

duration.description: Duration of the cooldown, in seconds, before the item can perform an action of the specified "type" again.

type.description: The type of action the cooldown applies to. Options are mutually exclusive, so cooldown for one type of action does not affect the others. Values: "use" (when using an item), "attack" (when attack with an item).
type.title: ItemCooldownType

1612372290.title: minecraft:cooldown

1722961183.description: Specifies the maximum weight limit that a storage item can hold

max_weight_limit.description: The maximum allowed weight of the sum of all contained items. Maximum is 64. Default is 64.

1722961183.title: minecraft:storage_weight_limit

1788805030.description: [EXPERIMENTAL] Storage Items can be used by other components to store other items within this item.

allow_nested_storage_items.description: Determines whether another Storage Item is allowed inside of this item. Default is true.

allowed_items.description: List of items that are exclusively allowed in this Storage Item. If empty all items are allowed.

banned_items.description: List of items that are not allowed in this Storage Item.

max_slots.description: The maximum allowed weight of the sum of all contained items. Maximum is 64. Default is 64.

1788805030.title: minecraft:storage_item

1849296816.description: The allow_off_hand component determines whether the item can be placed in the off hand slot of the inventory.

value.description: Determines whether the item can be placed in the off hand slot.

value.description: Determines whether the item is rendered like a tool while in the player's hand.

1856946845.title: minecraft:hand_equipped

1884046047.description: Overrides the swing sounds emitted by the user.

attack_critical_hit.description: Sound played when an attack hits and deals critical damage.

attack_hit.description: Sound played when an attack hits.

attack_miss.description: Sound played when an attack misses or deals no damage due to invulnerability.

1992003962.description: The tags component specifies which tags an item has on it.

tags.description: An array that can contain multiple item tags.

2325096106.description: Should_despawn component determines if the item should eventually despawn while floating in the world

value.description: Determines whether the item should eventually despawn while floating in the world.

2325096106.title: minecraft:should_despawn

2406761778.description: Modifies use behavior, including how long the item takes to use and the player's movement speed.

emit_vibrations.description: Whether vibrations are emitted when the item starts or stops being used.

movement_modifier.description: Multiplier applied to the player's movement speed while the item is in use.

start_sound.description: Sound played when the item starts being used. Accepts a sound event name string.

start_using.description: Controls how using the item triggers start using behavior. "if_first" only starts if no other component has started using yet; "always" always restarts using. Defaults to "if_first".
start_using.title: StartUsing

use_duration.description: Time, in seconds, that the item takes to use.

2406761778.title: minecraft:use_modifiers (beta)

2473825852.description: Projectile items shoot out, like an arrow.

minimum_critical_power.description: Specifies how long a player must charge a projectile for it to critically hit.

projectile_entity.description: Which entity is to be fired as a projectile.

2473825852.title: minecraft:projectile

24763745.description: The hover_text_color component specifies the color of the item name when the players hovers the cursor over the item.

value.description: Specifies the color of the item's hover text.

24763745.title: minecraft:hover_text_color

249997987.description: Defines both the durability threshold, and the effects emitted when that threshold is met.

durability.description: The effects are emitted when the item durability value is less than or equal to this value.

particle_type.description: Particle effect to emit when the threshold is met.
particle_type.title: ParticleType

sound_event.description: Sound effect to emit when the threshold is met. Accepts a sound event name string.

249997987.title: minecraft:durability_sensor durability_threshold (beta)

2659245187.description: Digger item component specifies how quickly this item can dig specific blocks.

destroy_speeds.description: A list of blocks to dig with correlating speeds of digging.

use_efficiency.description: Determines whether this item should be impacted if the efficiency enchantment is applied to it.

2659245187.title: minecraft:digger

2865317605.description: Specifies the maximum weight limit that a storage item can hold

weight_in_storage_item.description: The weight of this item when inside another Storage Item. Default is 4. 0 means item is not allowed in another Storage Item.

2865317605.title: minecraft:storage_weight_modifier

2890009531.description: Allows an item to deal kinetic damage and its effects. This happens every tick while in use, in a straight line along the user's view vector, with damage computed based on both the user's and the target's velocity projected onto the view vector (via a dot product). The more the user and target move toward each other, and the more this movement is aligned with the user's view vector, the higher the damage. After "damage_multiplier" and "damage_modifier" are applied, the resulting damage is floored to the nearest lower integer.

creative_reach.description: Defines the reach used when the user is in Creative Mode. Defaults to "reach" if unspecified.

damage_conditions.description: Conditions that need to be satisfied for damage to be applied. If not specified, damage is not applied.

damage_modifier.description: Value added to the the scaled dot product (after applying "damage_multiplier").

damage_multiplier.description: Value multiplied to sum of the dot products of the user and target's velocity vectors projected onto the view vector.

delay.description: Time, in ticks, after which kinetic damage and its effects start being applied.

dismount_conditions.description: Conditions that need to be satisfied for riders to be dismounted. If not specified, riders cannot be dismounted.

hitbox_margin.description: Added tolerance to the view vector raycast for detecting entity collisions.

knockback_conditions.description: Conditions that need to be satisfied for knockback to be applied. If not specified, knockback is not applied.

reach.description: Defines the range (in blocks) along the user's view vector where entities can be hit. Only targets within this distance are considered. Block collisions between the user and target block damage and its effects.

2890009531.title: minecraft:kinetic_weapon

300033528.description: Conditions that need to be satisfied for a specific effect of a kinetic weapon to be applied.

max_duration.description: Time, in ticks, during which the effect can be applied after "delay" elapses. If negative, the effect is applied indefinitely.

min_relative_speed.description: Minimum relative speed of the user with respect to the target (projected onto the view vector via a dot product) required for the effect to be applied.

min_speed.description: Minimum user's speed (projected onto the view vector via a dot product) required for the effect to be applied.

300033528.title: minecraft:kinetic_weapon kinetic_effect_conditions

oneOf.x-runtime-constraint-description: Check that a valid block name or expression is provided, and in the latter case verify that there are no block states as well
Check that a valid block name or expression is provided, and in the latter case verify that there are no block states as well

3110660491.description: Allows an item to deal damage to all entities detected in a straight line along the user's view vector. Items with this component cannot destroy blocks, as the attack action always takes priority, regardless of what the user is looking at.

creative_reach.description: Defines the reach used when the user is in Creative Mode. Defaults to "reach" if unspecified.

hitbox_margin.description: Added tolerance to the view vector raycast for detecting entity collisions.

reach.description: Defines the range (in blocks) along the user's view vector where entities can be hit. Only targets within this distance are considered. Block collisions between the user and target block damage and its effects.

3110660491.title: minecraft:piercing_weapon

minecraft:allow_off_hand.description: The allow_off_hand component determines whether the item can be placed in the off hand slot of the inventory.

minecraft:block_placer.description:
Items with the block_placer component will place a block when used. 
This component can also be used instead of the "minecraft:icon" component to render the referenced block as the item icon.

minecraft:bundle_interaction.description: [EXPERIMENTAL] Adds bundle-specific interactions and tooltip to the item. Requires a "minecraft:storage_item" component.

minecraft:can_destroy_in_creative.description: The can_destroy_in_creative component determines if the item can be used by a player to break blocks when in creative mode.

minecraft:compostable.description: Specifies that an item is compostable and provides the chance of creating a composting layer in the composter

minecraft:cooldown.description: Adds a cooldown to the item so that, after performing an action of the specified "type", all items with a "minecraft:cooldown" component in the same "category" become unable to perform that same type of action for the number of seconds defined in "duration".

minecraft:damage.description: The damage component determines how much extra damage the item does on attack.

minecraft:damage_absorption.description: It allows an item to absorb damage that would otherwise be dealt to its wearer. For this to happen, the item needs to be equipped in an armor slot. The absorbed damage reduces the item's durability, with any excess damage being ignored. Because of this, the item also needs a `minecraft:durability` component.

minecraft:digger.description: Digger item component specifies how quickly this item can dig specific blocks.

minecraft:display_name.description: The display_name item component specifies the text shown whenever an item's name is displayed, like in hover text.

minecraft:durability.description: The durability item component specifies how much damage the item takes before breaking, and allows the item to be combined to repair or augment them.

minecraft:durability_sensor.description: Enables an item to emit effects when it receives damage. Because of this, the item also needs a `minecraft:durability` component.

minecraft:enchantable.description: The enchantable component specifies what enchantments can be applied to the item. Not all enchantments will have an effect on all item components.

minecraft:entity_placer.description: The entity_placer item component specifies the blocks that the item can be placed on.

minecraft:fire_resistant.description: Determines whether the item is immune to burning when dropped in fire or lava.

minecraft:food.description: When an item has a food component, it becomes edible to the player. Must have the 'minecraft:use_duration' component in order to function properly.

minecraft:fuel.description: Fuel item component allows this item to be used as fuel in a furnace to 'cook' other items.

minecraft:glint.description: The glint component determines whether the item has the enchanted glint render effect on it.

minecraft:hand_equipped.description: The hand_equipped component determines if an item is rendered like a tool while it is in a player's hand.

minecraft:hover_text_color.description: The hover_text_color component specifies the color of the item name when the players hovers the cursor over the item.

minecraft:icon.description: Icon item component determines which icon graphic will be used to represent the item in the UI and elsewhere.

minecraft:interact_button.description: This component is a boolean or string that determines if the interact button is shown in touch controls and what text is displayed on the button. When set as true, default "Use Item" text will be displayed.

minecraft:kinetic_weapon.description: Allows an item to deal kinetic damage and its effects. This happens every tick while in use, in a straight line along the user's view vector, with damage computed based on both the user's and the target's velocity projected onto the view vector (via a dot product). The more the user and target move toward each other, and the more this movement is aligned with the user's view vector, the higher the damage. After "damage_multiplier" and "damage_modifier" are applied, the resulting damage is floored to the nearest lower integer.

minecraft:liquid_clipped.description: The liquid_clipped component determines whether the item interacts with liquid blocks on use.

minecraft:max_stack_size.description: The max_stack_size component specifies how many of the item can be stacked together.

minecraft:piercing_weapon.description: Allows an item to deal damage to all entities detected in a straight line along the user's view vector. Items with this component cannot destroy blocks, as the attack action always takes priority, regardless of what the user is looking at.

minecraft:projectile.description: Projectile items shoot out, like an arrow.

minecraft:rarity.description: Specifies the base rarity and subsequently color of the item name when the player hovers the cursor over the item.

minecraft:record.description: Record Item Component. Used by record items to play music.

minecraft:repairable.description: The repairable item component specifies which items can be used to repair this item, along with how much durability is gained.

minecraft:should_despawn.description: Should_despawn component determines if the item should eventually despawn while floating in the world

minecraft:stacked_by_data.description: The stacked_by_data component determines whether the same items with different aux values can stack. Also defines whether the item entities can merge while floating in the world.

minecraft:storage_item.description: [EXPERIMENTAL] Storage Items can be used by other components to store other items within this item.

minecraft:storage_weight_limit.description: Specifies the maximum weight limit that a storage item can hold

minecraft:storage_weight_modifier.description: Specifies the maximum weight limit that a storage item can hold

minecraft:swing_duration.description: Duration, in seconds, of the item's swing animation played when mining or attacking. Affects visuals only and does not impact attack frequency or other gameplay mechanics.

minecraft:swing_sounds.description: Overrides the swing sounds emitted by the user.

minecraft:tags.description: The tags component specifies which tags an item has on it.

minecraft:throwable.description: Throwable items can be thrown by the player, such as a snowball.

minecraft:use_animation.description: Use_animation specifies which animation is played when the player uses the item.

minecraft:use_modifiers.description: Modifies use behavior, including how long the item takes to use and the player's movement speed.

minecraft:wearable.description: Wearable items can be worn by a player in a specified slot.

3150009352.description: [EXPERIMENTAL] Adds bundle-specific interactions and tooltip to the item. Requires a "minecraft:storage_item" component.

num_viewable_slots.description: The maximum number of slots in the bundle viewable by the plater. Can be from 1 to 64. Default is 12.

3150009352.title: minecraft:bundle_interaction

320508795.description: Specifies that an item is compostable and provides the chance of creating a composting layer in the composter

composting_chance.description: The chance of this item to create a layer upon composting with the composter. Valid value range is 1 - 100 inclusive

320508795.title: minecraft:compostable

3242860599.description: This component is a boolean or string that determines if the interact button is shown in touch controls and what text is displayed on the button. When set as true, default "Use Item" text will be displayed.
3242860599.title: minecraft:interact_button

3325653656.description: Enables an item to emit effects when it receives damage. Because of this, the item also needs a `minecraft:durability` component.

durability_thresholds.description: The list of both durability thresholds and effects emitted when each threshold is met. When multiple thresholds are met, only the threshold with the lowest durability after applying the damage is considered.

items.description: Defines both the durability threshold, and the effects emitted when that threshold is met.

3325653656.title: minecraft:durability_sensor (beta)

3378607947.description: Throwable items can be thrown by the player, such as a snowball.

do_swing_animation.description: Determines whether the item should use the swing animation when thrown. Default is set to false.

launch_power_scale.description: The scale at which the power of the throw increases. Default is set to 1.0.

max_draw_duration.description: The maximum duration to draw a throwable item. Default is set to 0.0.

max_launch_power.description: The maximum power to launch the throwable item. Default is set to 1.0.

min_draw_duration.description: The minimum duration to draw a throwable item. Default is set to 0.0.

scale_power_by_draw_duration.description: Whether or not the power of the throw increases with duration charged. Default is set to false.

3378607947.title: minecraft:throwable

3383997803.description: Determines whether the item is immune to burning when dropped in fire or lava.

value.description: Determines whether the item is immune to burning when dropped in fire or lava.

3383997803.title: minecraft:fire_resistant

duration.description: Amount of time, in seconds, this fuel will cook items.

357550247.description: The damage component determines how much extra damage the item does on attack.

value.description: Specifies how much extra damage the item does, must be a positive number.

357550247.title: minecraft:damage

3611145847.description: The can_destroy_in_creative component determines if the item can be used by a player to break blocks when in creative mode.

value.description: Determines whether the item can be used to destroy blocks while in creative mode.

3611145847.title: minecraft:can_destroy_in_creative

items.description: Items that may be used to repair an item.

repair_amount.description: How much the item is repaired.

3654280593.description: When an item has a food component, it becomes edible to the player. Must have the 'minecraft:use_duration' component in order to function properly.

can_always_eat.description: If true you can always eat this item (even when not hungry). Default is set to false.

nutrition.description: Value that is added to the entity's nutrition when the item is used. Default is set to 0.

saturation_modifier.description: saturation_modifier is used in this formula: (nutrition * saturation_modifier * 2) when applying the saturation buff. Default is set to 0.6.

using_converts_to.description: When used, converts to the item specified by the string in this field. Default does not convert item.

3654280593.title: minecraft:food

3737626741.description: The entity_placer item component specifies the blocks that the item can be placed on.

dispense_on.description: List of block descriptors of the blocks that this item can be dispensed on. If left empty, all blocks will be allowed.

entity.description: The entity to be placed in the world.

use_on.description: List of block descriptors of the blocks that this item can be used on. If left empty, all blocks will be allowed.

3737626741.title: minecraft:entity_placer

3754481289.description: Specifies the base rarity and subsequently color of the item name when the player hovers the cursor over the item.

value.description: Sets the base rarity of the item. The rarity of an item automatically increases when enchanted, either to Rare when the base rarity is Common or Uncommon, or Epic when the base rarity is Rare.

3754481289.title: minecraft:rarity

3821849217.description: menu_category contains the creative group name and category for this item.

category.description: Creative category where this item belongs. Defaults to "none".
category.title: CreativeItemCategory

group.description: The Creative Group that this item belongs to. Group name is limited to 256 characters. The name also must start with a namespace.

is_hidden_in_commands.description: Determines whether or not this item can be used with commands. Defaults to false.

3821849217.title: menu_category

3842531986.description: It allows an item to absorb damage that would otherwise be dealt to its wearer. For this to happen, the item needs to be equipped in an armor slot. The absorbed damage reduces the item's durability, with any excess damage being ignored. Because of this, the item also needs a `minecraft:durability` component.

absorbable_causes.description: List of damage causes that can be absorbed by the item. By default, no damage cause is absorbed.

3842531986.title: minecraft:damage_absorption

4153824736.description: Record Item Component. Used by record items to play music.

sound_event.description: A sound event name string identifying the music to play.

4219241994.description: The liquid_clipped component determines whether the item interacts with liquid blocks on use.

4281216112.description: The enchantable component specifies what enchantments can be applied to the item. Not all enchantments will have an effect on all item components.

slot.description: Specifies which types of enchantments can be applied. For example, `bow` would allow this item to be enchanted as if it were a bow.

value.description: Specifies the value of the enchantment (minimum of 0).

4281216112.title: minecraft:enchantable

4293743214.description: Icon item component determines which icon graphic will be used to represent the item in the UI and elsewhere.

textures.description: This map contains the different textures that can be used for the item's icon. Default will contain the actual icon texture. Armor trim textures and palettes and bundle open textures can be specified here too. The icon textures are the keys from the resource_pack/textures/item_texture.json 'texture_data' object associated with the texture file.

4293743214.title: minecraft:icon v1.21.80

509260318.description:
Items with the block_placer component will place a block when used. 
This component can also be used instead of the "minecraft:icon" component to render the referenced block as the item icon.

aligned_placement.description: If true, block placement through this item will be aligned while holding the interaction button down. Defaults to false.

block.description: Defines the block that will be placed.

replace_block_item.description: If true, the item will be registered as the item for this block. This item will be returned by default when the block is broken/picked. Note: the identifier for this item must match the block's identifier for this field to be valid. Defaults to false.

use_on.description: List of block descriptors of the blocks that this item can be used on. If left empty, all blocks will be allowed.

509260318.title: minecraft:block_placer

search_inventory.description: Can search inventory? Default is set to false.

use_in_creative.description: Can use in creative mode? Default is set to false.

use_offhand.description: Can use off-hand? Default is set to false.

speed.description: Digging speed for the correlating block(s).

5745680.description: The durability item component specifies how much damage the item takes before breaking, and allows the item to be combined to repair or augment them.

damage_chance.description: Specifies the percentage chance of this item losing durability. Default is set to 100. Defined as an int range with min and max value.
damage_chance.x-runtime-constraint-description: Check that the limits imposed on the range (minimum, maximum and maximum distance between values) are respected

max_durability.description: Max durability is the amount of damage that this item can take before breaking. This is a required parameter and has a minimum of 0.

5745680.title: minecraft:durability

577883191.description: The stacked_by_data component determines whether the same items with different aux values can stack. Also defines whether the item entities can merge while floating in the world.

577883191.title: minecraft:stacked_by_data

590136708.description: Contains the required identifier for the item. May contain optional fields like menu_category.

identifier.description: Unique name for the item that must include a namespace and must not use the Minecraft namespace unless overriding a Vanilla item.

menu_category.description: menu_category contains the creative group name and category for this item.

590136708.title: description

714977863.description: The glint component determines whether the item has the enchanted glint render effect on it.

value.description: Determines whether the item has the glint effect.

charge_on_draw.description: Charge on draw? Default is set to false.

max_draw_duration.description: Draw Duration. Default is set to 0.

scale_power_by_draw_duration.description: Scale power by draw duration? Default is set to false.

value.description: Specifies which animation to play when the the item is used.
value.title: Animation

value.description: Specifies how many of the item that can be stacked.
